name: maintenance_interrupt
description: Tenant starts gathering an amenity booking, then pivots to a maintenance issue. The LLM emits switch_maintenance; finalizeAccessSwitchToMaintenance clears the access lane and returns null so the next pipeline stage can pick the turn up through the maintenance gather. Regression for 'maintenance request hijacks access conversation' (Piece 3).

turns.userMessage: want to book the game room

llm.reply: Got it — when would you like the Game Room? For example: tomorrow 5-7 pm.

turns.userMessage: actually i have a leak in my bathroom

llm.reply: Got it — switching to maintenance. Tell me where exactly the leak is.
